issue_title: :bug: Fix infinite loading on drop file
issue_body_preview:
## What was happening
As described in #27, the app shows "Loading your package file..." forever if some error happens on file dropping.
As mentioned by @Delta-official, it works when the file is selected instead of dropped, so it might be some incompatibility with the drop event on your browser/fi
test_description_zh: 在首页通过拖拽方式将一个数据包文件放入文件上传区域，观察页面加载状态是否能正常完成或显示错误提示，而不是一直停留在加载中状态。
expected_result_zh: 拖拽文件到上传区域后，如果文件有效则正常解析并跳转/显示数据；如果文件无效或发生错误，应显示相应的错误提示信息，而不是永远显示'Loading your package file...'的加载状态。
